CustomObject.description: Document count thresholds by NEPA review pathway (CE, EA, EIS), derived from Stage 6 analysis of NEPATEC 2.0 (61,881 projects). P50/P90 document count thresholds and the Elevated_Flag_At__c threshold used to set nepa_elevated_doc_complexity__c on IndividualApplication. High document counts indicate administrative complexity and often precede procedural completeness litigation.
CustomObject.label: NEPA Doc Count Threshold

fields.description: NEPA review pathway: CE, EA, or EIS.
fields.label: Pathway

fields.description: Median document count for this pathway across NEPATEC 2.0 corpus.
fields.label: P50 Document Count

fields.description: 90th percentile document count for this pathway across NEPATEC 2.0 corpus.
fields.label: P90 Document Count

fields.description: Document count at which nepa_elevated_doc_complexity__c is set to true on IndividualApplication. Equals P90_Count__c for CE and EA; set at 22 for EIS (P90=34 but 22 is the operational trigger for proactive review).
fields.label: Elevated Flag At
